posts.author: SorrowfulWatcher_24
posts.text: I've been ignoring your warnings for three weeks now because you refuse to act. But tonight at 8:00 PM, I'm going to confront the people who keep harassing me right in front of Westbridge station. They're waiting for me there too. It's time to settle this once and for all. #Justice #NoMoreWarnings
posts.explanation: This post contains a credible threat of planned violence at a specific time and location, requiring specialist investigation.
